temporaryTitle.message: Sorry, we’ve removed this page for now
temporaryTitle.description: Title of the page that is shown when a page has been temporarily removed.

permanentlyTitle.message: Sorry, we’ve taken this page down
permanentlyTitle.description: Title of the page that is shown when a page has been permanently removed.

temporaryMessage.message: We’re making changes to PREreview and have removed this page for now.
temporaryMessage.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’ve removed this page for now”.

permanentlyMessage.message: We’re making changes to PREreview and have removed this page.
permanentlyMessage.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’ve taken this page down”.

getInTouch.message: If you have any questions or you selected a link or button, please <link>get in touch</link>.
getInTouch.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’ve removed this page for now” or “Sorry, we’ve taken this page down”.
